titleStmt.title: SII 6.160: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 160. (A.R. No. 200 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakalaparamavaṁśōdbhava bhāradvājagōtra kaṭvāṁgaddhvaja riṣabhalāṁcana kāṁcīpuravarēśva
ra kaḍvāyiparaghōṣaṇa pallavakulatilakapādāṁbujasēvita Annuvakāmakulādhināya
ka Anēkabaṁdhujanāśraya patihitābharaṇa patimeccugaṁḍa gaṁḍarābharaṇa nōḍuvaḍi sāhasārjju
na saṁgrāmarāma samaraikabhīma ḍakkunūḍlasāsanādhipa viprakulāśraya śrīvēṁggidēśacālukyanaṁkakāṟa pa
ramaṇḍalacūṟakāṟa patidēvagurudvijabhaktuṇḍunu kuṟamaṟajamuṇḍunaina mahāmaṇḍalika bhīmenāyakuṇḍu .
vibhrājamānō bhuvi puṇyakīrtyā bhīmāhvayaḥ śauryyaguṇādiśālī . śrīmānayaṁ paṁgayanētrusū
nurbādāṁbikānaṁdamahōdadhīṁduḥ . dīpadvayaṁ bhāvasurēśvarāya prādādvibhūttye paramēśvarā
ya . Ācaṁdratāraṁ bhuvi puṇyakīrttipradānadakṣaṁ harayē varāya . śākābdē nayanēṣu khēṁdugaṇi
tē bhīmāhvayōkhaṇḍitaṁ prādāddīpayugaṁ vasaṁtaviṣuvē kīrttiprabhāmuṣṇavē . bhrājadbhīmagabhīravā
rivibhavaśrīdakṣiṇāṁbhōnidhēḥ pārē saṁhatayā śrībhāvadēvāya tatu . śakhavarṣa 1052 gu
nēṇṭi viṣuvusaṁkrāṁti nimityamuna kammanāṇṭi prēṁpalli śrī bhāvanārāyaṇadēvaraku Ācaṁdrārkka makhaṇḍavartti diviyalu
reṇṭiki niccina modavulu 50 . vīniṁ jēkoni prēṁppalli kariyaĀkaṇḍu tana putrānupavitrikamu nitya maḍḍeṁḍu neyi vōyaṁgga
lavāṇḍu . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ jvā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 6.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
